name: X-Golf Omaha
about: X-Golf Omaha is a golf simulation venue located in Omaha, Nebraska. The venue offers indoor golf simulation technology for players of all skill levels. Despite the website being inaccessible at the time of data extraction, the venue is expected to provide a modern golfing experience with various amenities and technology options. The pricing and specific offerings would typically be available through their website or direct contact.
why_golfers_like_it: Suitable for both casual and serious players
Available for corporate and group events
Coaching services available for skill improvement
